title: Privacy, Data Governance, Retention, Deletion, and Residency · Runtime Lens: Rag Data Inventory Purpose
summary: A RAG index contains copied customer records, embeds unnecessary identifiers, logs raw queries and passages, cannot erase derived data, and sends context to an undocumented region. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the data inventory purpose increment in governed RAG data-lifecycle record. Learners progress th…
objectives: Inventory data categories, subjects, owners, purposes, authority, sensitivity, flow, processors, regions, retention, and deletion duties.
Validate and encode output, prohibit secret leakage, and require independent authorization, confirmation, bounds, and audit before any tool effect.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-privacy-governance-2
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-privacy-governance-2.
# Case 7417: a regulated document deletion request.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def worked_rag_privacy_governance_2(records: int = 100, pii_records: int = 8, authorized_records: int = 8, deletion_lag_hours: int = 4, retention_days: int = 30, residency_valid: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "corpusworked2",
        "query2dekrow",
        "tenant7417",
        "indexworked27417",
        "prompt2dekrow7417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if records < 0 or pii_records < 0 or pii_records > records:
        return False, pii_records, "inventory"
    if authorized_records != pii_records:
        return False, authorized_records, "purpose-access"
    if deletion_lag_hours < 0 or deletion_lag_hours > 24:
        return False, deletion_lag_hours, "deletion-sla"
    if retention_days <= 0 or not residency_valid:
        return False, retention_days, "governance-policy"
    assert authorized_records <= records
    return True, retention_days, "governed-lifecycle"

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Inventory data categories, subjects, owners, purposes, authority, sensitivity, flow, processors, regions, retention, and deletion duties.

hints: For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Data Inventory Purpose model · Theory Rag Data Inventory Purpose, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Data Inventory Purpose precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Defend the Rag Data Inventory Purpose model · Theory Rag Data Inventory Purpose, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 2776 during a public-benefits policy change. Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce data minimization, purpose, access, deletion, retention, residency, and embedding privacy; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Inventory data categories, subjects, owners, purposes, authority, sensitivity, flow, processors, regions, retention, and deletion duties.

For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Data Inventory Purpose model · Theory Rag Data Inventory Purpose, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: An internal knowledge base can be indexed for any internal AI purpose.
